$comment: Template for a portal collection FormSchema produced per portal-channel data request. The agent fills `fields` from the request's unit / granularity / evidence_required / quality_params. Select fields are enum-constrained to platform dropdown values (ls-ingestion rule). Rendered by app/(portal)/[engagementId]/submit/[requestId]/page.tsx.
title: {{request.label}} — {{site_name}} ({{period_label}})
